case_title: GUADALUPE TUMANG VS. GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2009 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-23-2009 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506, PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. THE COURT GRANTS LATE REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE. COPY SENT TO PARTIES.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM ALAN SILVERMAN FILED BY TUMANG, GUADALUPE GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION
SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT & ANSWER FILED, BY PLTFF.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

ORDER SC-108A: PLTFF'S REQUEST "DENIED": COUNSEL FAILS TO CITE ANY STATUTORY OR CASE LAW IN SUPPORT OF THIS REQUEST. COUNSEL ALLEGES A CONTRACTUAL OBLIGATION BY DEFT. BUT FAILS TO PROVIDE ANY EVIDENCE INCLUDING THE CONTRACT TO SUPPORT HIS ALLEGATIONS.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,200.00 FILED BY TUMANG, GUADALUPE AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-19-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF TUMANG, GUADALUPE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING - FILED BY PLAINTIFF- IS "DENIED".THE CASE REMAINS SET ON THE ORIGINAL HEARING DATE. ALL PARTIES MUST BE PRESENT ON THAT DATE. FILING A CASE AND THEN LEAVING IT PENDING FOR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS GROUNDS IS NOT AN APPROPRIATE USE OF THE COURT'S RESOURCES. THE PARTIES SHOULD RESOLVE THE DISPUTE OR BE PREPARED TO TRY IT ON THE DATE SET.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2009 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-19-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF TUMANG, GUADALUPE

ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING IS "DENIED", FILED BY THE DEFENDANT GEICO INSURANCE COMPANY. THE CASE REMAINS SET ON THE ORIGINAL HEARING DATE. ALL PARTIES MUST BE PRESENT ON THAT DATE (MAR-23-2009 AT 6:30 PM DEPT.506). PLAINTIFF HAS ESTABLISHED GOOD CAUSE FOR THE EVENING SETTING.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-23-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-23-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ALAN SILVERMAN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TUMANG, GUADALUPE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GEICO GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
